# Venus Universe Nehrunagar — 4 BHK Luxury Apartments in Nehrunagar & 5 BHK Premium Flats Ahmedabad

> 4 BHK Luxury Apartments in Nehrunagar, 5 BHK Premium Flats in Nehrunagar Ahmedabad, Ultra Luxury Apartments Near Nehrunagar — Venus Universe Nehrunagar (Venus Nehrunagar). Premium under-construction luxury apartments Nehrunagar. Pre-booking open. Site office welcoming visitors.

Venus Universe (also known as Venus Universe Nehrunagar, Venus Nehrunagar, Venus Nehrunagar Ahmedabad, Venus Universe Ahmedabad, Venus Universe Nehrunagar Ahmedabad) is a luxury under-construction residential project offering 4 BHK Luxury Apartments in Nehrunagar and 5 BHK Premium Flats in Nehrunagar Ahmedabad. Located in Nehrunagar, central Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India, the project offers ultra luxury apartments near Nehrunagar with carpet sizes from 1,550 sq ft to 2,475 sq ft, including duplex penthouses and jodi-house options.

## Key Facts

- Project name: Venus Universe Nehrunagar
- Developer: Venus Group (Venus Universe Nehrunagar)
- Location: Nehrunagar, Ahmedabad, Gujarat 380015, India
- Configuration: 4 BHK Luxury Apartments & 5 BHK Premium Flats
- Carpet sizes: 1,550 / 1,775 / 2,100 / 2,475 sq ft
- Status: Under construction, pre-booking open
- RERA: MAA17082/080726/311232
- Site office: Open for visits in Nehrunagar, Ahmedabad
- Land parcel: 7 acres, 70% open area, 2.2 acre podium
- Architect: Hafeez Contractor
- Landscape: SWA, California
- Interiors: HBA, Singapore
- Lighting: LET, Dubai
- EOI: ₹5,00,000 (100% refundable) — locks priority allotment & pre-launch pricing

## Why Venus Universe Nehrunagar

Nehrunagar is the most premium central micro-market of Ahmedabad — minutes from CG Road, Ashram Road, Paldi, IIM Ahmedabad, top schools, hospitals and retail. Venus Universe is one of the largest 4 BHK Luxury Apartments in Nehrunagar and 5 BHK Premium Flats in Nehrunagar Ahmedabad developments, and the leading destination for ultra luxury apartments near Nehrunagar.
